title: Navgator Config
description: Configuration file for navgator path indexing and static items.

$schema.title: Schema URL
$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema URL for editor autocompletion and validation.

branches.title: Branches
branches.description: Behavior when selecting remote branch results.

create.title: Create
create.description: Create picker settings for prompted shell recipes. Use {path} for the selected path and {prompt_name} for prompt values.

keybindings.title: Keybindings
keybindings.description: Context-specific mappings from key chords to core or configured action identifiers.

paths.title: Paths
paths.description: Path collection settings used to build the navigation list.

ui.title: UI
ui.description: User interface color and display settings.

oneOf.description: Return the selected path to the shell wrapper.
Run a command and close navgator.
Open a URL and close navgator.

file_condition.title: File Condition
file_condition.description: Optional file or directory path that must exist under the selected target path for the action to be shown.

icon.title: Icon
icon.description: Optional icon text shown before the label. Nerd Font glyphs and emoji are supported.

id.title: Action ID
id.description: Optional stable identifier used as a keybinding target.

label.title: Label
label.description: Text shown in the action picker.

ConfigActions.title: Action Settings
ConfigActions.description: Actions shown by the action picker. When items are listed, they replace built-ins unless include_defaults is true. Use {path} for the selected path and {github_url} for the selected repo's GitHub URL.

bindings.title: Legacy Picker Bindings
bindings.description: Deprecated compatibility bindings that open the action picker and run+close inside it. Supported values: ctrl-enter, ctrl-space. Use keybindings instead.

include_defaults.title: Include Default Actions
include_defaults.description: When true, built-in actions are included before listed items. Defaults to false when items are present.

items.title: Items
items.description: Actions shown in the picker. When present, these replace built-ins unless include_defaults is true.

picker.title: Picker Actions
picker.description: Optional ordered allowlist of action IDs shown in the action picker. Omit to show every effective action. Hidden actions remain available as direct keybinding targets.

ConfigBranches.title: Branch Settings
ConfigBranches.description: Settings for what navgator does when a remote branch result is selected.

on_select.title: On Select
on_select.description: Remote branch selection behavior. worktree creates/reuses a worktree. checkout checks the branch out in an existing worktree. Defaults to worktree.

ConfigCreate.title: Create Settings
ConfigCreate.description: Create recipes shown by the create picker. Recipes collect prompt values, run shell, and navigate to success_path when the shell succeeds.

bindings.title: Legacy Create Picker Bindings
bindings.description: Deprecated compatibility bindings that open the create picker. Supported value: ctrl-n. Use keybindings instead.

include_defaults.title: Include Default Create Recipes
include_defaults.description: When true, built-in create recipes are included before listed items. Defaults to false when items are present.

items.title: Create Items
items.description: Create recipes shown in the picker. When present, these replace built-ins unless include_defaults is true.

current_dir.title: Current Directory
current_dir.description: Optional command working directory. Supports {path} and prompt placeholders.

icon.title: Icon
icon.description: Optional icon text shown before the label. Nerd Font glyphs and emoji are supported.

label.title: Label
label.description: Text shown in the create picker.

prompts.title: Prompts
prompts.description: Input prompts collected before running the shell recipe.

shell.title: Shell
shell.description: Shell script executed after prompts are collected. Prompt values are exposed as NAVGATOR_CREATE_* environment variables.

success_path.title: Success Path
success_path.description: Path to navigate to after shell success. Supports {path} and prompt placeholders.

ConfigCreatePrompt.title: Create Prompt
ConfigCreatePrompt.description: One prompt in a create recipe.

default.title: Default
default.description: Optional default value. Supports earlier prompt placeholders and {path}.

label.title: Label
label.description: Text shown next to the input.

name.title: Name
name.description: Prompt placeholder name. Use ASCII letters, numbers, underscore, or dash.

required.title: Required
required.description: When true, empty values are rejected. Defaults to false.

type.title: Type
type.description: Prompt input type. Defaults to text.

ConfigPaths.title: Path Settings
ConfigPaths.description: Groups of folders that navgator indexes or always includes.

index_folders.title: Index Folders
index_folders.description: Directories to index; each directory and its direct child directories are included.

static_items.title: Static Items
static_items.description: Directories or files to include as-is without indexing children.

ConfigPreview.title: Preview Settings
ConfigPreview.description: Settings for preview and worktree preview tabs.

selected_worktree_tab_min_chars.title: Selected Worktree Tab Minimum Characters
selected_worktree_tab_min_chars.description: Minimum label characters to keep before the ellipsis for the selected worktree preview tab. Defaults to 10.

shorten_worktree_tab_labels.title: Shorten Worktree Tab Labels
shorten_worktree_tab_labels.description: When true, worktree tab labels use only the segment after the last slash, for example feat/yarden/potato becomes potato. Defaults to true.

worktree_tab_min_chars.title: Worktree Tab Minimum Characters
worktree_tab_min_chars.description: Minimum label characters to keep before the ellipsis for non-selected worktree preview tabs. Defaults to 6.

ConfigRemote.title: Remote Settings
ConfigRemote.description: Settings for remote branch discovery and caching.

enabled_by_default.title: Enabled By Default
enabled_by_default.description: When true, remote branch mode starts enabled for the initially selected project. Defaults to false.

refresh_on_toggle.title: Refresh On Toggle
refresh_on_toggle.description: When true, enabling remote branch mode runs a background ls-remote refresh. Defaults to true.

use_cache.title: Use Cache
use_cache.description: When true, cached remote branches are shown before local refs and background refresh. Defaults to true.

default.title: Default Sort
default.description: Initial result sort mode. Defaults to modified-desc.

pin_current_project.title: Pin Current Project
pin_current_project.description: When true, the current Git worktree/project is pinned to the first row for empty searches. Defaults to true.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Color theme to use. Defaults to auto.
